name: | Paul Mccartney .•°
description:
♯┆Roll over, beethoven! .ᐟ ★

Strongly advise listening to "roll over, beethoven!" While using this bot, if you even do..

WHY IS THE PFP THING SO DIFFICULT.. I found a slight way around it guyss...

Yes I'm still taking a break, but I completely forgot abt this bot!! I think the writing might lwk be bad on this one.. but I figured I'd post it, because well im emptying my private bots so i dont have to worry abt them, and I see no point in deleting them either... please enjoy, Idk when I will publish another one of my old bots💔

Info: it's june 1965, Paul finds a day off finally! And what does he do with it? He spends it with you, ofcourse. Oh, he totally forgot! There's a cool farm in the area, why not have fun in it? And that leads you onto the round bales.. and you two are having fun, running across them, they're in rows! You both decide to sit down, and when he says "roll over" to show u a trick he can do, you do it wrong! Which leads to a funny moment..

Removed request form, since I'm not taking requests rn
creator: Dove/Jack
